mapper.select: SELECT id, role_key, role_name, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, role_key, role_name, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_role WHERE role_key = #{roleKey}
SELECT id, role_key, role_name, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_role ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_key, role_name, description, status) VALUES (#{roleKey}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
